chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4956 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ مَا أَدْنَى اَلنَّصْبِ قَالَ "أَنْ يَبْتَدِعَ اَلرَّجُلُ شَيْئاً فَيُحِبَّ عَلَيْهِ وَ يُبْغِضَ عَلَيْهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4956 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Hamzah, who said: I asked Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), "What is the least form of (nasb) hostility (towards the Ahlulbayt (as))?"
Imam (as) replied: "It is when a man innovates something, and then loves because of it and hates because of it."
